untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'swing failures at formation boundaries' and 'characteristic accumulation patterns' which require custom pattern recognition logic not available in the standard indicator set. The specific thresholds for minimum consolidation bars and confirming signals are marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] and cannot be determined from the source text. Volume profile signature analysis and precise swing failure counting require pattern detection beyond point-in-time indicator values.
translation_notes: Translated using proxy indicators: price_pos_20 for position within range (lower quartile for long entries ≤0.25, upper quartile for short entries ≥0.75), vol_ratio_20 for declining volume during consolidation, and bb_bandwidth for consolidation tightness. Entry conditions set for CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction with symmetric long/short logic. Exit at formation support/resistance approximated by Bollinger Bands. Risk-reward ratio set to 2:1 per signal specification. Unable to encode swing failure detection or multi-bar consolidation minimum without custom pattern logic.
